judge_reason: Description A states the blue stamp is 'illegible' while Description B provides specific, different verbatim text for it, indicating a direct contradiction on the visual content of the stamp.
original_image_tags: A scan of a white document page, appearing mostly blank. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top. A faint, illegible, and reversed blue stamp or text is visible near the top center. At the bottom center, a clear, blue ink stamp is printed upside down. The stamp text is transcribed above. There are some brown stains in the bottom right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Blank off-white document page with three black punch holes along the top edge, a small black arrow-like mark near the upper left, and a blue upside-down stamp near the lower center reading “MR. JONES / OF 8 3/4 IN/35C / RECEIVED / FBI / U S DEPT. OF JUSTICE.”*
